title: selaginella leucobryoides
intro: Selaginella leucobryoides, also known as Spike Moss or False Hair Cap Moss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella leucobryoides include its potential to improve respiratory health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Selaginella leucobryoides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
